summary: AWS auth expired after Lane 4 issued an EC2 stop request, so final stopped/no-public-IP proof remains blocked even though the local lease is free.
exact_owner_next_action: Lane 4 should run aws login, then aws ec2 describe-instances --instance-ids i-0560bf8d143f93bb1 --query "Reservations[].Instances[].{State:State.Name,PublicIpAddress:PublicIpAddress,PublicDnsName:PublicDnsName}" --output json. If state is not stopped, Lane 4 must reacquire the shared lease and stop the instance immediately.
lane7_constraints: Lane 7 must not run aws login for Lane 4.
Lane 7 must not start or stop EC2.
Lane 7 must not promote or re-block trackers.
